meta.title: Clarifying Rule 24a of the International Code of Nomenclature of Bacteria
meta.journalTitle: International Journal of Systematic and Evolutionary Microbiology

abstractHtml: Note 1 of Rule 24a of the International Code of Nomenclature of Bacteria can be interpreted in an ambiguous fashion, because the wording is not sufficiently clear. It is proposed that the wording of this note be modified to clarify this point.
